meta.title: Behind The Scenes Photoshop "Star Painting" with @EverydayAstronaut
meta.description:
A long one but a good one! We also figured out how to save large TIFF files and photoshop files with layers over 4 gb's at the end. Join us LIVE every Thursday at 1:00 p.m. Central (19 UTC) at http://twitch.tv to add your ideas or ask questions! 

Make sure and see the final image on Instagram @EverydayAstronaut
